It has a seamless and boning-free design and fits your body perfectly, so you'll feel like you don't even have one. The shoulder straps are easily adjustable and the fastening at the back offers three hooks in four rows so that it adapts optimally to you. You can easily remove the hook with one hand, so you can start breastfeeding without any delay.
